_comment: STING Resolution Heuristics — user-editable overrides to the built-in ResolutionHeuristics.Suggest() patterns. Each entry maps an ordered (CategoryA, CategoryB) pair to a suggestion template. Placeholders available: {dz_mm}, {dy_mm}, {dx_mm}, {systemA}, {systemB}, {productA}, {productB}. Matching is ordered — first hit wins. 'ServiceFirst: true' means the matcher normalises so the MEP/service element is always A (structural moves to B). Unknown placeholders are left untouched.

Patterns.Suggestion: Lower duct by {dz_mm} mm to clear beam bottom flange + 50 mm.
Route pipe below or around beam; offset by {dz_mm} mm.
Add IFC opening element + pipe sleeve at wall penetration.
Add IFC opening element and verify fire-rating sleeve type.
Align sprinkler head Z to ceiling grid Z.
Confirm light fixture is hosted by the ceiling family.
Offset tray horizontally by {dx_mm} mm to maintain 100 mm clearance.
Route conduit above or below duct bank.
Verify equipment support and maintenance clearance zones.
Rebuild wall around column or offset wall centreline.
